nasb.text: “Now as for you, son of man, I have appointed you a watchman for the house of Israel; so you will hear a message from My mouth and give them warning from Me.

esv.text: “So you, son of man, I have made a watchman for the house of Israel. Whenever you hear a word from my mouth, you shall give them warning from me.

cnv.text: “人子啊！我立了你作以色列家守望的人，所以你要聆聽我口中的話，替我警告他們。

ccb.text: “人子啊，现在我立你为以色列人的守望者，你要听我的信息，代我警告他们。
